title: Asuka still got her face ripped off in 222 Spoilers
display_title: Asuka still got her face ripped off in 222 Spoilers
wikitext:
[]: Asuka still got her face ripped off in 2.22-Spoilers             Quote Post by Ritsuko » Wed Feb 23, 2011 8:57 am (Sorry if old) This is what I found doing frame by frame. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Wed Feb 23, 2011 9:59 am looks more like facehuggah action to me, whatever it's worth

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Feb 23, 2011 10:04 am I think I remember that shot. Wasn't it in 2.0 as well? Or are we just referring to all releases of the film?

[]:             Quote Post by Ritsuko » Wed Feb 23, 2011 10:17 am FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: I think I remember that shot. Wasn't it in 2.0 as well? Or are we just referring to all releases of the film?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Feb 23, 2011 10:27 am Someone (Reichu?) had convinced me it was a goo glob splatting onto her face. That's still what it seems like to me.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Feb 23, 2011 10:29 am I think it was in 2.0 as well. I've only seen 2.0 in theaters and I remember Asuka's face opening up into blue. I do a lot of video editing for a living, so I've gotten the hang of measuring and catching quick moments like this. Especially when it comes to Asuka .

[]:             Quote Post by Ritsuko » Wed Feb 23, 2011 10:40 am FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: I think it was in 2.0 as well. I've only seen 2.0 in theaters and I remember Asuka's face opening up into blue. I do a lot of video editing for a living, so I've gotten the hang of measuring and catching quick moments like this. Especially when it comes to Asuka .

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Wed Feb 23, 2011 11:20 am NAveryW wrote: Someone (Reichu?) had convinced me it was a goo glob splatting onto her face. That's still what it seems like to me.

[]:             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Wed Feb 23, 2011 11:24 am Thereafter, Ritsuko seem to hint as to what they might do to Asuka next: Ritsuko: Physiologically, all traces of contamination are gone, but there is the chance the Angel infiltrated her mind. Ritsuko: She'll have to be kept quarantined for now. Maya: They won't neutralize her, will they? Ritsuko: She's a priceless specimen. Ritsuko: They wouldn't dare.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Wed Feb 23, 2011 1:31 pm It makes little sense - why insert this in two single frames? If you hadn't read the rejected script, you wouldn't even have made that association - the "rip off face" scene was in there because they were probably hesitant to get rid of the mind rape (It might still appear in 3.0, tough) - The significance of it would've been the sheer violence/psychologic effect/words to go with it. Showing it in two frames with no dialogue makes no sense, because the dialogue/needles/violence of it was the POINT. This is simply the blue light -y thing Asuka saw in the depht of the plug. She is flying through it, probably entering wherever Bardiel needs her to be.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Wed Feb 23, 2011 1:56 pm I thought it's fairly obvious that the blue stuff is Bardiel's own contamination goo. Eva-03's Entry Plug is covered in it: [URL=http://img826.imageshack.us/i/stuffu.jpg/] [/URL] EDIT: Warren Peace wrote: Yeah, that's definitely the angel attaching itself to her. They probably decided against the face ripping thing mainly because Asuka seems to still have one in 3.0.

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Wed Feb 23, 2011 1:56 pm Yeah, that's definitely the angel attaching itself to her. They probably decided against the face ripping thing mainly because Asuka seems to still have one in 3.0. That Ritsuko and company found her face and put it back on would have been a bit much

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Feb 23, 2011 2:04 pm Some more interesting stuff about this starting about here: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=9156&postdays=0&postorder=asc&start=40

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Wed Feb 23, 2011 2:21 pm SaltyJoe wrote: They should have gone with these storyboards, damnit, grumble grumble

[]:             Quote Post by Nonoriri » Wed Feb 23, 2011 2:41 pm Warren Peace wrote: Yeah, that's definitely the angel attaching itself to her. They probably decided against the face ripping thing mainly because Asuka seems to still have one in 3.0. That Ritsuko and company found her face and put it back on would have been a bit much

[]:             Quote Post by Ritsuko » Wed Feb 23, 2011 3:04 pm Ornette wrote: Some more interesting stuff about this starting about here: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=9156&postdays=0&postorder=asc&start=40

[]:             Quote Post by BC Baron » Wed Feb 23, 2011 5:53 pm SaltyJoe wrote: I thought it's fairly obvious that the blue stuff is Bardiel's own contamination goo. Eva-03's Entry Plug is covered in it: [URL=http://img826.imageshack.us/i/stuffu.jpg/] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Wed Feb 23, 2011 6:06 pm Apparently, the NME version of Bardiel was reverse engineered from Dann of Thursday (never could quite get the hang of Thursdays).

[]:             Quote Post by Seen » Wed Feb 23, 2011 8:52 pm I remember seeing a picture of the "Rei face" that pops up right before this happens. It had a few frames of it, along with a traced outline of it. Does anyone have it? As for the "tang'd VS covered in Bardiel goo" thing, I'd have to go with the latter. If 01 bit the plug in half, she would have poured out of the thing, right? She wouldn't be able to regain her physical form like she is shown with later.

[]:             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Wed Feb 23, 2011 9:55 pm Seen wrote: I remember seeing a picture of the "Rei face" that pops up right before this happens. It had a few frames of it, along with a traced outline of it. Does anyone have it? As for the "tang'd VS covered in Bardiel goo" thing, I'd have to go with the latter. If 01 bit the plug in half, she would have poured out of the thing, right? She wouldn't be able to regain her physical form like she is shown with later.
